calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:11am
Judge Pro Tem Al Anolik, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Monique Ann Richardson appears with attorney Alex Pfeifer. Respondent, Ben Si Li appears with attorney Lawrence Ma and Cantonese interpreter San Ong.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Anolik.

Mr. Richardson is called as a witness and testifies and anwers questions from Judge Anolik.

9:47am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Continued To Jun-29-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
